subcodes.first_line: O ye two blessed leaves! Even as these two leaves have sprung forth from the sacred Tree, and the dewdrops of the clouds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو ورقهٌ مبارکه چون آن دوورقه از شجرهٌ مبارکه روئیده ورشحات سحاب
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @living waters; water of life
